Transcrição Completa: 34 Refunds Policy No Refunds

 

[00:00][music]

 

[00:02] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "No Refunds Policy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Política de não reembolso absoluta, conceito de proteção legal para serviços intangíveis

 

[00:02]"Absolutely under no circumstances do you offer a refund."

 

[00:07]"However, guarantees are okay if you're confident and certain that you can get somebody a result for a higher ticket service that you are selling and you really want to drive home that you can do it successfully."

 

[00:20]"But you're extremely confident and certain in a real way, not in a factitious way that you can actually do it."

 

[00:27]"That way you avoid having to give out the refund or the guarantee from not being able to service the client the way you thought you could."

 

[00:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Legal Protection Through Agreements"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Estrutura de proteção legal, acordos customizados do programa, cláusulas específicas de não reembolso

 

[00:35]"But under no circumstances do you sell a service where you are legally protected with one of the agreements that you customize for yourself out of this program should you ever expose yourself to needing to refund money."

 

[00:49] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Intangible Marketing Service Clause"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Linha específica do contrato destacada, cláusula de serviço intangível que não pode ser devolvido ou revogado

 

[00:49]"There is a specific line in that agreement that says this is an intangible marketing service that cannot be returned or revoked once service fees are paid."

 

[00:59]"That's it. There are no refunds."

 

[01:02]"You need to have every person initial next to that in the DocuSign agreement that you're going to send over to them when taking on new clients so they acknowledge that there's no refunds."

 

[01:13] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Physical vs Intangible Service Comparison"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Comparação visual entre produto físico (torta/bolo) vs serviço intangível de marketing, conceito de impossibilidade de devolução

 

[01:13]"You are selling an intangible service. This is not where somebody goes, buys a pie or a cake, doesn't like the flavor, and can take it back because they have the physical pie or cake."

 

[01:24]"This is not the case. You have time, energy, attention, expenses. You have an entire set of back-end actions that are taken for somebody."

 

[01:33]"And Lord forbid whether you fail or succeed that that person's unsatisfied and they ask for a refund."

 

[01:39]"Do not take on any deals where you feel you're going to have to refund."

 

[01:43] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Ethical Business Standards"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Framework ético de negócios, distinção entre reclamações injustificadas vs erro genuíno do prestador

 

[01:43]"Don't under any circumstances listen to the complaining, bitching clients when they come back and say, 'No, I want a refund for this.'"

 

[01:51]"If you unethically did business or it was completely unfair and you know that you're in the wrong, do what's right and give a refund."

 

[02:00]"But to be clear, if you're ethically in the clear, if you truthfully are on the side of I know I did this successfully, I know I did what I needed to do in this deal and things didn't work out or things did work out. By no means should you be doing a refund."

 

[02:15] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Expectations Equal Success"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Princípio fundamental de gestão de expectativas, momento crítico antes do fechamento do negócio

 

[02:15]"Once again, at the beginning of the deal, before a deal is even done, expectations equal success."

 

[02:21]"Have them initial on the agreement before the deal is done. I acknowledge and then this is an intangible marketing service that cannot be returned or revoked once services are rendered."

 

[02:33]"Service fees cannot be returned or refunded. That's all you need."

 

[02:38] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Dispute Protection Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Sistema de proteção contra disputas, evidência legal com acordo assinado e inicial específica

 

[02:38]"If they ever do a dispute, you have a legal agreement with them signing that they're not going to do a refund and with an initial right next to where it says word for word, this is an intangible marketing service that cannot be returned or revoked."

 

[02:52]"Once services are rendered, that's it. There's no refunds. That's all you need."

 

[02:56] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Compelling Evidence Documentation"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Hierarquia de evidências - texto, email, vídeos (melhor opção), sistema de documentação progressiva

 

[02:56]"If you ever in a dispute situation, you need to have compelling evidence and documentation."

 

[03:01]"This is why I recommend along the way that of course you're getting testimonials from clients both documented in text, email, and of course videos are better than anything else."

 

[03:11] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Agreement Amendments Protocol"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Processo de emenda de contratos, riscos de mudanças não documentadas, proteção legal através de amendments

 

[03:11]"If you ever make any changes beyond what you have in the agreement and you have to amend the agreement, just know that if you do not amend the agreement and things don't work out between you and the client and they dispute the charge and you take to American Express or to the bank when you submit inside a Stripe for your dispute evidence."

 

[03:32]"Don't expect to have that agreement that you had legally signed that they acknowledged."

 

[03:37]"If there's an amendment that happened, meaning something changed from what was on the piece of paper and you didn't choose to amend it legally, that means that you're in the wrong and that you're going to have to accept that dispute."

 

[03:49] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Risk Hedging Best Practices"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Estratégia completa de proteção - acordo legal + inicial + amendments quando necessário

 

[03:49]"However, don't expect to go into business and get disputes. Don't expect to go into business and get refunds."

 

[03:55]"But to hedge against that risk, use a legal agreement every time. Have them initial next to it."

 

[04:02]"And if you do anything outside of the agreement, make an amendment to the initial agreement so it still is legally upstanding and will be respected given the person gets emotionally reactive and does a dispute against you in your business."

 

[04:16] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Final Policy Summary"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Resumo da política absoluta de não reembolso, reforço do conceito de serviço intangível

 

[04:16]"Under no circumstances do you offer refunds. There's no need to offer refunds. You have an intangible marketing service."

 

[04:24]"And as I said at the beginning of this, it is okay to offer guarantees should you be confident and certain enough in a real way, not in a factitious way where you can get somebody a result and that will enable them to close faster."

 

[04:37] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "High Ticket Guarantee Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Uso estratégico de garantias para high ticket, demonstração de confiança e certeza para acelerar fechamento

 

[04:37]"Especially for high ticket deals. It shows certainty and confidence when you do such a thing, but it doesn't have to be done for every deal."

 

[04:46]"I'll see you guys in the next video."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Nenhum número específico mencionado (política focada em proteção legal)

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Política absoluta de não reembolso

Sistema de proteção legal através de acordos customizados

Cláusula específica: "Intangible marketing service that cannot be returned or revoked"

Processo de initial obrigatório no DocuSign

Sistema de documentação progressiva (texto → email → vídeo)

Protocolo de amendments para mudanças contratuais

Uso estratégico de garantias apenas para high ticket

Framework "Expectations Equal Success"

Estratégia de evidências para disputas (Stripe, American Express, bancos)

 

ESTRUTURA:

Cláusula Fundamental: "This is an intangible marketing service that cannot be returned or revoked once service fees are paid"

Hierarquia de Evidências: Texto < Email < Vídeo (melhor)

Proteção Legal em 3 Camadas:

Acordo legal customizado

Initial do cliente na cláusula específica

Amendments documentados para qualquer mudança

Distinção Ética: Apenas reembolsar se genuinamente no erro, nunca por reclamação injustificada

Garantias vs Reembolsos: Garantias permitidas se confiança real em resultados (especialmente high ticket)

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Service fees não podem ser retornados ou reembolsados

Proteção contra disputas em Stripe

Proteção contra chargebacks (American Express, bancos)

 

CONCEITOS-CHAVE:

Serviço intangível ≠ Produto físico (analogia torta/bolo)

Time, energia, atenção e despesas já investidas

Back-end actions não podem ser "devolvidas"

Reação emocional de clientes não justifica reembolso

Certainty e confidence através de garantias (não reembolsos)

Amendments necessários para manter proteção legal

 

FERRAMENTAS MENCIONADAS:

DocuSign (para acordos e initials)

Stripe (sistema de disputas)

American Express (disputas de cartão)

 

DURAÇÃO: ~4:50 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional sobre política de reembolsos e proteção legal em vendas de serviços
